task_completion.description: Verify that a Freeform Fin set has been added to the Body Tube.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the OpenRocket component tree (usually on the left), there should be a 'Freeform fin set' attached as a child to the 'Body tube'. The old trapezoidal fins should no longer be present.

task_completion.description: Verify the fin count and thickness are set correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the fin configuration dialog, the 'Number of fins' should be set to 3, and the 'Thickness' should be set to 3.0 mm.

task_completion.description: Verify the Freeform Fin shape coordinates match the required planform.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Shape' tab of the fin configuration dialog, the coordinate table should display the exact X,Y points: (0,0), (45,50), (65,50), and (75,0) in millimeters.

task_completion.description: Verify the modified rocket design is saved to the correct path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenRocket window title bar or a 'Save As' dialog should show the file name 'freeform_rocket.ork' being saved to the '/home/ga/Documents/rockets/' directory.

task_completion.description: Verify a flight simulation is run to generate apogee and stability data.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Flight simulations' tab in OpenRocket should be open, showing a completed simulation run with calculated values for Apogee and Stability margin.

task_completion.description: Verify the flight simulation report is created with the required information.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal should show the file 'fin_integration_report.txt' in '/home/ga/Documents/exports/' containing the fin type (Freeform), thickness (3.0 mm), and the simulated apogee altitude and stability margin values obtained from OpenRocket.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the OpenRocket GUI to modify the design.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the OpenRocket application interface being interacted with, rather than the agent manually editing the .ork XML file in a text editor.

integrity.description: Verify the report contains actual simulation data.
integrity.visual_evidence: The apogee and stability values in the text report must match the values visible in the OpenRocket 'Flight simulations' tab, rather than being placeholder text or fabricated numbers.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually performed the simulation rather than just writing a text file.
integrity.visual_evidence: There must be evidence of the OpenRocket simulation being run (e.g., a green checkmark or populated data rows in the simulation tab) before the text report is written.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target ORK file path: /home/ga/Documents/rockets/freeform_rocket.ork. Target report path: /home/ga/Documents/exports/fin_integration_report.txt. Expected fin count: 3. Expected fin thickness: 3.0 mm. Expected fin shape coordinates (X,Y in mm): Point 1 (0,0), Point 2 (45,50), Point 3 (65,50), Point 4 (75,0).
